feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot see community.sap.com attached graphs
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I am trying to see the entire content of the following blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-members/same-day-ach-how-to-set-up-your-sap-system-1-of-2/ba-p/13133409#:~:text=Same%2DDay%20ACH%20lessens%20outstanding,three%20settlement%20windows%20each%20day.

but only the text is shown, when I try to display/download the graphs, I receive the following error:

403. That’s an error.

Your client does not have permission to get URL /gsBIXI-VD6YqHD_U-DayhzGfP7YDwbuYgPGxp5w34Car4pbCmujKSSZFz7hN8A9XxfMp-xsrm94oVDMJhNeLT8zY-30tpWc7DJEr099My2OfObsxUVXoZ9xiByAybiUW3NoWcqM from this server. (Client IP address: 147.161.190.118)
ACL Denied That’s all we know.

Please help.

Regards, Armando

entry.title: How can I add code formatting in a comment in response to a question on the SAP Community page?
entry.content:
Hello poweruser of this community platform!

I have recently experienced a situation where a question in the Technology area got my attention and I did not feel like my response was wroth an answer but rather a comment. I needed to add some lines of code but in the comment section I can only hit enter to submit my post but have no option to add formatted text like a list of entries or even a code snippet. Can someone link me a guide or tell me how to do it?

Kind regards!

PS: Or is it simply "open a new tab, start a question and use the editor, copy the text and insert it in the comment field + close the question tab"?

entry.title: Polluted by many questions NOT about SAP Websites in Community 2024
entry.content:
There are two big issues in the Q&A of Community 2024: people using the button "Answer" (means "give solution") to just comment without giving a solution (the issue was addressed, let's see if that improves), and the other one is:

Half of my inbox is polluted by people asking a non-SAP-Websites question in the group "Question about SAP Websites".

The reason is clear for me, they don't know where to post their SAP question, even if they search, they don't find the right group:

  • The top menu contains "Products and Technology > Questions about SAP Websites", they choose it because they don't see a group corresponding to their question and because it contains the word "SAP" (lazy solution of course).
  • The top level "Create a post" is missing a search field, so they can't find easily, and they choose the easiest choice "Questions about SAP Websites".

     

  • Even if a search field existed, make sure to extend the search to the group description, e.g. there's no group "sap business one", the right group is ERP Q&A ("SAP Business One" is in the group description):

The six first months, I did tell the Original Poster that the question was posted to the wrong group, then I decided to alert the moderator to move the question to the right group.

No idea what's the best solution.

Is that in the list of planned enhancements? If not, could you add it?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: create a blog button is disabled. Could anyone please help me to enable it.
Error trying to activate CERB02 license: partner misconfiguration
entry.content:
Hi,

I tried to activate my CERB02:SAP Global Certification Online Exam for SAP Learning Hub, Solution Editions (2 attempts) license and got the following error

We are unable to process your order at this time. Please contact your local SAP Training and Adoption office and provide error: partner misconfiguration.

I have drafted a support case and it remains In-Process and will not respond. Please advise me what to do.

entry.title: What kind of html tags are supported?
entry.content:
Everytime i write a blog post and paste html content in or edit and old blog post i get the error that some html tags are unsupported.
Unfortunately i don´t get which one are supported and which not.

Is there a overview of all allowed/supprted html tags so i can avoid or correct it?

entry.title: Badges are not showing
entry.content: Why my earned badges are not showing in my profile that  i have earned in sap tutorial .

entry.title: After registering with universal ID, I am unable to login to my older profile and access my blog
entry.content:
HI,

I have posted a blog back in 2023 using my S user id. I recently created a universal ID and linked it to my S user id. However, now I am not able to access my blog post.

This new account

1. Doesn't show my blog post in "My posts". 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-optimize-the-technical-monitoring-of-application-in-solution-manager/ba-p/13549991

2. Doesn't allow me to post any blog at all.

How can I get my access back?

Please help!.

Thanks,

Aditya.

entry.title: icontent link error
Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am running the boosters of sap build apps, and i am facing below mentioned error due to which i am unable to subscribe sap build apps.

I have tried subscribing the sap build app manually also, however it is also resulting in subscription failed in my trial account.

Please help in getting the solution for the same.

SAP Build SAP BTP cockpit

entry.title: In the inbox, why " 'user' tagged the product" although it's just a reply?
entry.content:
I'm just wondering why I receive this post in my inbox marked " 'user' tagged the product" although it doesn't seem to be a tagging action, it's just a reply (link to https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/what-is-the-use-of-display-maintenance-not-allowed/m-p/14020288#M2038550) :

although it's tagged ABAP Development everywhere.

Also, another post was marked more logically "replied to topic" in my inbox (link to https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/excel-upload-using-rap-application/m-p/14017216#M2038534) :

Any idea why? Could the mark be improved? (to be "replied to topic")

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: Required SAP Notes for Transition to New EBS Formats
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to introduce new formats for electronic bank statements (EBS) in transaction FF_5. Specifically, the transitions are as follows:

  • From camt 053.001.02 to camt 053.001.08
  • From camt 052.001.02 to camt 052.001.08
  • From pain 001.001.03 to pain 001.001.09
  • From dtazv to pain 001.001.09
  • From pain 008.001.02 to pain 008.001.08

I have found that for some of these formats, the following SAP Notes need to be implemented:

  • 3187339 - DE_"AZV-pain001" to replace "DTAZV" in international payments
  • 2881354 - Transformation camt053.001.008

However, I am unsure about the mandatory SAP Notes required for the other format transitions. Does anyone know which additional SAP Notes must be implemented before proceeding?

Thanks in advance for any insights!

entry.title: Improvement Request – Enhance to user experience of the Notification feed
entry.content:
May I please get the community's thoughts on the current notifications feed functionality/bugs and whether the request below would help improve the user experience? (Please ignore if this has already been discussed or planned for future releases.)

1) Upon logging into the SAP Community page, the notifications feed is my usual go-to place to catch up on the latest blogs and questions/discussions in my subscribed tags. In this case, I see 8 unread notifications.

After opening the notification feed, I saw that the unread notifications were highlighted with a blue banner. I was able to open only 3 out of the 8 unread notifications, intending to return later to the remaining ones.

The old notifications do not have a blue colour indicator, as they are considered read.

Based on the number of notifications in the feed, it is practically impossible to catch up with all unread notifications at once (here 8 notifications). It would be helpful if only opened notifications were marked as read, ensuring that unread ones remain highlighted for future reference and adding an option to mark all of them as read.

However, when I refresh or reload the page, all 8 notifications are marked as read, even though I did not open 5 of them, so it is difficult to continue where I left off.

2) Additionally, when there are a large number of notifications, the feed fails to paginate properly and gets stuck on the progress indicator, preventing access to older notifications. A smoother pagination experience would significantly enhance usability, especially for users catching up on the content after a few days.

 

 

3) Currently, there are no filtering options to sort notifications by category, such as Read/Unread, Blogs, or Q&A. Adding these filters would improve the user experience by allowing easier access to relevant notifications.

I hope these suggestions to the notifications feed will improve the user experience and I would love to hear the feedback from the community on these suggestions. 

Regards

Virinchy

entry.title: SBPA: Integrate different projects in visibility dashboard
entry.content:
Dear community, 

Let me first describe some context: 

  • I have 5 projects which all have one or multiple business processes. 
  • A launchpad is set up to start the business processes and see tasks in the Inbox App

My question now is:
How to set up and configure a visibility scenario dashboard without doing so for each project individually? 
Why do I want this?
I'd like to avoid to configure and maintain

  1. a visibility scenario per project
  2. multiple tiles for each visibility scenario dashboard in the launchpad.

My thoughts were to create a new project exclusively for this visibility scenario, where I import the said projects as an dependency. Unfortunately, I get the error stating: "The operation could not be performed due to missing permission.". 

Could somebody share their thoughts on this?
Why do I get the error "Acces denied"? And if there exists a workaround to integrate all business processes in one (1) dashboard.

Looking forward to your feedback. 
C.

entry.title: SUP AATP
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please give me explanation on aATP SUP, how system identify whether it is vertical or horizontal supply protection?

Thanks in advance

Regards

Rinku

entry.title: Help me with this code to display the FG code against each material code.
entry.content:
This is my abap code block

DATA: it_fg_code TYPE TABLE OF mast-matnr,   " Table to store FG Codes
      matnr1      TYPE mast-matnr.           " Variable for single FG Code

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK B1 WITH FRAME TITLE text-001.

SELECT-OPTIONS material FOR mast-matnr.
SELECT-OPTIONS plant FOR mast-werks.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK B1.

START-OF-SELECTION.

" Step 1: Fetch FG Code from MAST table for material type 'FERT'
SELECT DISTINCT mast~matnr
  INTO TABLE IT_MTYPE1
  FROM mast
  INNER JOIN mara ON mast~matnr = mara~matnr
  WHERE mast~matnr IN material
    AND mara~MTART = 'FERT'.

" Step 2: Fetch details from MAST, STPO, and MAKt for materials and their exploded parts
SELECT mast~werks
       mast~stlnr
       mast~matnr
       makt~maktx
       idnrk
       stpo~menge
  INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE itm_details
  FROM mast AS mast
  INNER JOIN stpo AS stpo ON mast~stlnr = stpo~stlnr
  INNER JOIN makt AS makt ON mast~matnr = makt~matnr
  WHERE mast~matnr IN material
    AND werks IN plant
    AND stpo~stlty = 'M'
    AND mast~stlal = mast~stlal.

IF NOT itm_details[] IS INITIAL.

  " Step 3: Fetch location data
  SELECT matnr
         werks
         lgpro
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it_loc
    FROM marc
    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN itm_details
    WHERE werks = itm_details-werks
    AND matnr = itm_details-matnr.

ENDIF.

IF NOT itm_details[] IS INITIAL.

  " Step 4: Fetch verification data for the materials
  SELECT mast~matnr
         mast~werks
         verid
         bdatu
         adatu
         mkal~stlal
         bstma
         idnrk
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it_ver
    FROM mast AS mast
    INNER JOIN mkal AS mkal ON mast~matnr = mkal~matnr
    INNER JOIN stpo AS stpo ON mast~stlnr = stpo~stlnr
    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN itm_details
    WHERE mast~werks = itm_details-werks
    AND mast~matnr = itm_details-matnr.

ENDIF.

* Step 5: Loop through itm_details and update FG Code for 'FERT' type materials
LOOP AT itm_details INTO DATA(ls_item).

  " Check if material type is 'FERT' by checking against IT_MTYPE1
  READ TABLE it_mtype1 INTO matnr1 WITH KEY matnr = ls_item-matnr.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    " Assign FG Code to the structure only for 'FERT' materials
    ls_item-fg_code = matnr1.  " Assign FG Code to the structure
  ELSE.
    " For exploded parts, set FG code to blank or empty
    ls_item-fg_code = ''.  " No FG code for exploded parts
  ENDIF.

The above mentioned code is displaying this output

I want on the FERT codes to be displayed against it.

entry.title: SFTP
Year-End Process Duplicated – Retained Earnings Posted Twice
entry.content:
We've encountered an issue where the year-end process was duplicated. Two different users had the year-end closing window open simultaneously.

Initially, they were troubleshooting some errors, and both ended up executing the process. Instead of SAP preventing the duplicate execution or crashing for one of them, the system allowed both executions, resulting in the same amount being posted to Retained Earnings twice.

Has anyone experienced this issue before? Any insights on why this happened?

Thanks

entry.title: Why does SAP close after running a macro script?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

After running the macro script, the report downloads fine but the entire SAP closes. 

The "Windows Script Host" window also appears with the error described: The remote server machine does not exist or is unavaiable session.findByld. Please support. Thanks!

entry.title: SAP SARA WRITE to file. What file type is the file? Ascii, binary?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working on archiving/deleting old IDOCS.  I'm using tcode SARA to test this.  When setting up the logical file, what should be the data type?

Is there a way to view the file to see what's in it?

 

Thank you!
